_**Agent (default)**_

Done. I added `meta_title` to the home page front matter in `content/english/_index.md`:

```yaml
meta_title: "JoRap Notes | Ideas, execution, and good sense, without the noise."
```

That follows the same pattern as your About, Blog, and Contact pages and is picked up by the `basic-seo` partial. After a build, the home page `<title>` is:

**JoRap Notes | Ideas, execution, and good sense, without the noise.**
